iron longsword: A serviceable blade forged by a village blacksmith. Nothing fancy, but it keeps the darkness at bay.
apprentice staff: A gnarled oak staff topped with a dimly glowing quartz crystal. Standard issue for students of the Arcane Academy.
steel dagger: Light and wickedly sharp. Favoured by those who prefer to end fights before they begin.
hunting bow: A sturdy recurve bow, well-oiled and strung with sinew. Many a meal has been earned with this.
